# Scaling SMB

> Scaling SMB helps small and medium local businesses get found online, convert more leads, and automate operations with local SEO, websites, custom web apps, and AI assistants.

## Services

- Local SEO — Google Maps and local search visibility for nearby customers
- Website — Conversion-focused sites for local businesses
- Web Application — Custom tools and workflow automation
- AI Employees — 24/7 lead response, booking, and follow-up in your brand voice

## Primary pages

- Home: /
- Blog: /blog/
- Book a strategy call: /#contact

## Blog topics

- Local SEO and Google Business Profile
- Website conversion and local lead generation
- Web applications and SMB automation
- AI for local business customer service
- Business growth and local marketing
